results.rendered_html:
apūrṇa a. Not full or completed, incomplete, deficient, imperfect; apūrṇamekena śatakratūnāṃ  R. 3. 38 ; apūrṇa eva paṃcarātre dohadasya  M. 3. 
— rṇaṃ Incomplete number or fraction.
Comp.
— kāla a. premature, untimely.
— (laḥ) premature or incomplete time; ˚ja abortive.
